title: Write and present reports
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Write and present reports demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research material

pcs.text: Identify and clarify report topic and objectives with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and clarify report topic and objectives with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and clarify report topic and objectives with client.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine sources of information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine sources of information.

pcs.text: Collect and organise information appropriate to report topic
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and organise information appropriate to report topic?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and organise information appropriate to report topic.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Research material

elements.title: Evaluate information

pcs.text: Confirm information collected is relevant and sufficient to address report objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm information collected is relevant and sufficient to address report objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm information collected is relevant and sufficient to address report objectives.

pcs.text: Seek clarification and assistance as required where information is unclear or difficult to understand
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek clarification and assistance as required where information is unclear or difficult to understand?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek clarification and assistance as required where information is unclear or difficult to understand.

pcs.text: Obtain additional information where available information is inadequate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain additional information where available information is inadequate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain additional information where available information is inadequate.

pcs.text: Assess information for its validity and reliability, and organise into a suitable form to aid decision making
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess information for its validity and reliability, and organise into a suitable form to aid decision making?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess information for its validity and reliability, and organise into a suitable form to aid decision making.

pcs.text: Confirm that conclusions drawn from relevant information are based on reasoned argument and appropriate evidence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that conclusions drawn from relevant information are based on reasoned argument and appropriate evidence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that conclusions drawn from relevant information are based on reasoned argument and appropriate evidence.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Evaluate information

elements.title: Produce a document

pcs.text: Use industry standard terminology and language that is applicable to the task and audience
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use industry standard terminology and language that is applicable to the task and audience?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use industry standard terminology and language that is applicable to the task and audience.

pcs.text: Organise the report logically, and confirm it is structured and balanced according to purpose, audience and context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise the report logically, and confirm it is structured and balanced according to purpose, audience and context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise the report logically, and confirm it is structured and balanced according to purpose, audience and context.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present report in required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present report in required format.

pcs.text: Confirm that conclusions reached reflect the stated objectives of the report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that conclusions reached reflect the stated objectives of the report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that conclusions reached reflect the stated objectives of the report.

pcs.text: Complete preparation within the specified timeframe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete preparation within the specified timeframe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete preparation within the specified timeframe.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Produce a document

elements.title: Deliver a verbal presentation

pcs.text: Confirm language is applicable to the task and audience
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm language is applicable to the task and audience?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm language is applicable to the task and audience.

pcs.text: Use concise and well-presented support materials to support oral presentations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use concise and well-presented support materials to support oral presentations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use concise and well-presented support materials to support oral presentations.

pcs.text: Allocate sufficient time to allow clear presentation of the desired topic
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate sufficient time to allow clear presentation of the desired topic?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate sufficient time to allow clear presentation of the desired topic.

pcs.text: Deliver verbal presentation within specified time
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deliver verbal presentation within specified time?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deliver verbal presentation within specified time.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Deliver a verbal presentation

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
